# v1.6.0

## release on 20260715
## description
## changes
What's Changed

New Features 🎉

* feat(client): backport dark theme to v1.x by <a href="https://github.com/yifancong">@yifancong</a> in <a href="https://github.com/web-infra-dev/rsdoctor/pull/1824" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/web-infra-dev/rsdoctor/pull/1824/hovercard">#1824</a>. This PR syncs changes from <a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4655921298" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/web-infra-dev/rsdoctor/issues/1732" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/web-infra-dev/rsdoctor/pull/1732/hovercard" href="https://github.com/web-infra-dev/rsdoctor/pull/1732">#1732</a>, submitted by <a class="user-mention notranslate" data-hovercard-type="user" data-hovercard-url="/users/s-r-x/hovercard" data-octo-click="hovercard-link-click" data-octo-dimensions="link_type:self" href="https://github.com/s-r-x">@s-r-x</a>.

<a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" href="https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/18437716/622078535-f3fa2624-2054-4d8d-9a9a-c3c0b6ee396f.png?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..Q2fcZeXzUGuOh0demG1vcTf-Fp0fn-cCPpyj2uEnEy4"><img width="2000" height="1031" alt="image" src="https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/18437716/622078535-f3fa2624-2054-4d8d-9a9a-c3c0b6ee396f.png?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..Q2fcZeXzUGuOh0demG1vcTf-Fp0fn-cCPpyj2uEnEy4" content-type-secured-asset="image/png" style="max-width: 100%; height: auto; max-height: 1031px;"></a>

Other Changes

* Fix missing breadcrumb in treemap chart (v1.x) by <a href="https://github.com/s-r-x">@s-r-x</a> in <a href="https://github.com/web-infra-dev/rsdoctor/pull/1827" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/web-infra-dev/rsdoctor/pull/1827/hovercard">#1827</a>

<strong>Full Changelog</strong>: <a class="commit-link" href="https://github.com/web-infra-dev/rsdoctor/compare/245a87a...89f9e4d"><tt>245a87a...89f9e4d</tt></a>

v1.5.x Feature Highlights

* feat: report server options by <a href="https://github.com/yifancong">@yifancong</a> in <a href="https://github.com/web-infra-dev/rsdoctor/pull/1751" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/web-infra-dev/rsdoctor/pull/1751/hovercard">#1751</a>
* feat(agent-cli): support agent-cli by <a href="https://github.com/yifancong">@yifancong</a> in <a href="https://github.com/web-infra-dev/rsdoctor/pull/1618" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/web-infra-dev/rsdoctor/pull/1618/hovercard">#1618</a>
* feat(cli): support bundle-diff cli to output json data by <a href="https://github.com/yifancong">@yifancong</a> in <a href="https://github.com/web-infra-dev/rsdoctor/pull/1561" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/web-infra-dev/rsdoctor/pull/1561/hovercard">#1561</a>
* feat(rule): detect imported artifact types for dual packages by <a href="https://github.com/yifancong">@yifancong</a> in <a href="https://github.com/web-infra-dev/rsdoctor/pull/1578" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/web-infra-dev/rsdoctor/pull/1578/hovercard">#1578</a>
* feat(rule): support cjs require rule by <a href="https://github.com/yifancong">@yifancong</a> in <a href="https://github.com/web-infra-dev/rsdoctor/pull/1569" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/web-infra-dev/rsdoctor/pull/1569/hovercard">#1569</a>
* feat(rules): add E1007 tree-shaking-side-effects-only rule by <a href="https://github.com/yifancong">@yifancong</a> in <a href="https://github.com/web-infra-dev/rsdoctor/pull/1558" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/web-infra-dev/rsdoctor/pull/1558/hovercard">#1558</a>
